homepage.title: Homepage with full assessment form
homepage.description: Shows the main landing page with input form for full assessment
homepage.note: Demonstrates responsive form design with helper text and pill-button navigation.

results_page.title: Results page showing risk assessment output
results_page.description: Shows complete risk assessment results with charts and recommendations
results_page.note: Displays risk category badge, input summary, factor breakdown, and actionable recommendations.

quick_assessment.title: Quick assessment mode form
quick_assessment.description: Streamlined form with only 6 key inputs
quick_assessment.note: Demonstrates reduced input fields for rapid screening. Requires form toggle interaction.

risk_assessment_output.title: Risk assessment output mockup
risk_assessment_output.description: Illustrates the risk result screen, score badge, breakdown, and recommendations.
risk_assessment_output.note: Useful for report diagrams showing how output is presented to the user.

homepage_mockup.title: Homepage mockup
homepage_mockup.description: A landing page overview with quick start controls and navigation cards.
homepage_mockup.note: Provides a visual of the app homepage and entry points for assessments.

quick_assessment_form.title: Quick assessment form mockup
quick_assessment_form.description: A clean illustration of the quick assessment data entry page.
quick_assessment_form.note: Can be used as a report image for the simplified screening workflow.

history_table.title: Assessment history tracking interface
history_table.description: Shows saved assessment history in browser local storage
history_table.note: Displays chronological assessment records with name, age, risk category, and timestamp.
